label: Frames UI
testSteps: Open Frames; click Refresh and confirm existing Frames load
Create/edit a sentinel Frame and confirm body + tags persist
Toggle a Frame active and verify the active-only filter
regression: Frames list still loads after Hub sign-in
expected: Active state is consistent with the server

label: Import / Export
testSteps: Import a .md sample and confirm the body (and sentinel) populate
Export to Markdown and confirm content fidelity
Re-import the same file twice; cancel an export; export a name with unsafe characters
regression: Exported filename is OS-safe and ends in .md
expected: Cancel is a no-op with no error

label: Frame injection in chat
testSteps: Activate a sentinel Frame; start a NEW chat and ask for its marker (don't type the marker)
Deactivate the Frame; new chat; confirm the marker is gone
Activate two Frames; confirm both markers inject; edit one and confirm the fresh body is used
regression: Deactivation clears context in new chats
expected: Active Frames inject deterministically at run start
A single failed Frame fetch should not drop all Frames

label: OpenRouter
testSteps: Open Browse Models and confirm the catalog loads with NO API key
Save a tester key; confirm it is hidden afterward; Replace then Cancel keeps the old key
Enable a model; confirm the no-key chat guard; trigger a visible error with an invalid key
regression: Composer model switcher groups by source
expected: Keys never shown in clear text
OpenRouter models not selectable without a saved key
Model errors surface visibly, not a silent stall

label: Hub / OAuth
testSteps: Sign into the Hub via the system-browser OAuth flow
Confirm Hub models appear without creating a new API key
Open Frames and confirm it loads without a separate sign-in
regression: Hub/Frames auth state agree after restart
OAuth session restores or re-auths cleanly
expected: Fresh OAuth sign-in surfaces Hub models

label: Backend / Go
testSteps: Run go test ./... after the frontend build and note any failures
Confirm the bearer-stamping proxy still routes Frames requests
regression: Known internal/ravnar static:null test is unchanged
Proxy keeps OAuth tokens out of the frontend
expected: No new backend test failures introduced by this PR

label: Dependencies / Security
testSteps: Confirm the app still builds and launches after the dependency change
Run a smoke test of the most affected feature area
regression: No new install/build warnings beyond known ones
expected: Dependency bump introduces no functional regression

label: Build / Packaging
testSteps: Confirm Package App jobs pass for macOS, Windows, and Linux
Verify the artifact SHA-256 matches the shipped hash
Launch the packaged app and confirm no stray local artifacts were bundled
regression: Packaging succeeds on all three platforms
expected: No accidental local files (e.g. .pixi/) in the bundle
